# Calculate Project

A simple .NET-based project for performing calculations using Unit Test and GitHub Action.

## Features

- REST API for performing mathematical operations.
- Unit tests for key operations.

## Requirements

- .NET SDK 7.0 or higher.
- Windows or Linux environment.

## Build Status

![Build](https://github.com/douglassbarbosa/home/1-Portfolio-Projects/APIs/CaculateProject/CalculateProject/actions/workflows/dotnet-build.yml/badge.svg)

## Usage

1. Clone the repository:

   ```bash
   git clone https://github.com/douglassbarbosa/home.git

   ```
